title: White Steel & Copper Blend Shaver Adapter with 1Amp Fuse (5 x 4.8 x 4.7 cm) Single Piece - Lightweight & Perfect for Electric Shavers & Toothbrushes
features: COMPACT & TRAVEL - FRIENDLY: The white shaver adapter (5 x 4.8 x 4.7 cm) is designed to be compact and easily portable, making it a convenient option for all your grooming needs while on the go.

QUALITY MATERIALS: This adapter is made from durable and high-quality materials such as steel, copper, and secure electrical compartments. These materials ensure that the adapter is long-lasting and can withstand regular use, even while traveling.

LIGHTWEIGHT: One of the key features of this white shaver adapter is its lightweight design. It is easy to pack without adding significant weight or bulk to your luggage. This makes it an essential item for your travel kit.
HASSLE-FREEE GROOMING: Perfect for electric shavers and toothbrushes, our adapter provides a smooth transition from two to three pins, so you can focus on looking your best without any worries.

SAFE & SECURE: Each adapter comes with a 1-amp fuse that serves as a safety feature to protect your devices from electrical overload. This gives you peace of mind while using your shaver or toothbrush with the adapter.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality shaver adapter is lightweight sturdy. Great for travelling abroad or at home. Safety Warning No warning applicable
